content:

[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]    [ch]Bm7[/ch]
 I know you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]                       [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Don't know what I'm going through[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Dm7[/ch]       [ch]Em7[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]Bmaj7[/ch]
  Standing here looking at you[/tab]

[tab]                            [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]         [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Well let me tell you that it    hurts so bad[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj[/ch]                  [ch]Bm7[/ch]
  It makes me feel so sad[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                 [ch]Bm[/ch]               [ch]E7sus4[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]
  It makes me hurt so bad to see you again[/tab]

[tab]                  [ch]Am7[/ch]
Like needles and pins[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bm7[/ch]     [ch]Am7[/ch]                      [ch]Bm7[/ch]
People say    "you've been making out okay[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]        [ch]Em7[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]BMaj7[/ch]
  He's in love don't stand in his way"[/tab]

[tab]                            [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]         [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Well let me tell you that it    hurts so  bad[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj[/ch]                   [ch]Bm7[/ch]
   It makes me feel so sad[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                 [ch]Bm7[/ch]             [ch]E7sus4[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]
  It's gonna hurt so bad if you walk away[/tab]


[tab]               [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                   [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Why don't you stay and let me make it up to you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                [ch]Bm7[/ch]
I'll do anything you want me to[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]      [ch]Bm7[/ch]          [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]    [ch]Bm7[/ch]
You loved me before please love me again[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]        [ch]Bm7[/ch]         [ch]Am7[/ch]
I can't let you go back to her[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]
Please don't go[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Cmaj7[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch]  [ch]Cmaj7[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch]  [ch]Cmaj7[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch]  [ch]Cmaj7[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Please don't go--[/tab]

[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]
Please don't go[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
Please don't go[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]
Hurt so bad[/tab]

Come back it hurts so bad[/tab]

Don't make it hurt so bad[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Esus4[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]
I'm begging you please[/tab]
